assumptions: No prior Rollbar account configuration or successful use exists.
The developer has the browser and command-line tools listed by the selected path.

developer_goal: The Browser JavaScript quick-start snippet reports a test occurrence to the new Rollbar project.

first_success.outcome: The Browser JavaScript quick-start snippet reports a test occurrence to the new Rollbar project.
first_success.observable_signal: The occurrence appears in the Rollbar project dashboard with the test message and browser context.

route_selection.surface: Browser JS Quick Start snippet + first occurrence
route_selection.rule: Prefer the official hosted quickstart and cURL when documented; stop at the first observable successful happy-path result.
route_selection.selected: Browser JS Quick Start snippet + first occurrence

candidates.name: Browser JS Quick Start snippet + first occurrence
candidates.reason: It is the specified official path to the first-success boundary.

required_path.action: Create or sign in to Rollbar and create a Browser JavaScript project.
required_path.observable_result: The project dashboard and client token are accessible.

required_path.action: Add the documented Browser JS quick-start snippet to a page with the project access token.
required_path.observable_result: Rollbar is initialized when the page loads.

required_path.action: Load the page and invoke the documented test log or error call.
required_path.observable_result: The browser sends an occurrence to Rollbar.

required_path.action: Open the Rollbar project and confirm the first occurrence appears.
required_path.observable_result: The test occurrence is visible in the dashboard.

prerequisites.description: A browser page where the Browser JS snippet can run.

external_gates.description: A client-side token configured for browser reporting is required.
Browser content-security or network controls can block the reporting request.

platform_outcomes.description: The Browser JavaScript quick-start snippet reports a test occurrence to the new Rollbar project.

excluded.reason: This occurs after the selected first-success boundary.
This occurs after the selected first-success boundary.
This occurs after the selected first-success boundary.

sources.title: Send the first browser occurrence
evidence_supported: The Browser JavaScript quick-start snippet reports a test occurrence to the new Rollbar project.
The occurrence appears in the Rollbar project dashboard with the test message and browser context.

uncertainties.question: Does fresh-account UI wording differ from the documented Send the first browser occurrence path?
uncertainties.impact: A human should judge minor navigation differences without moving the first-success boundary.
